Custom Clothing Manufacturer for UK Brands

MOQ 50 pieces·DDP shipping to United Kingdom·Quotes in 24h
Home › Custom Clothing Manufacturer for UK Brands

Why British Brands Manufacture with FABRIOZA

  • 50-piece MOQ: launch or test a style without committing to a container. Most factories serving the UK demand 300–500 pieces per design.
  • Factory-direct pricing: we are the factory in Sialkot, Pakistan — no trading company margin. Typical savings vs UK domestic production run 45–60%.
  • Verified standards: ISO 9001 quality management, BSCI social compliance, OEKO-TEX fabric safety, WRAP certification — the audit trail British retailers ask for.
  • English-first communication with full UK working-hours overlap, quotes inside 24 hours, and one point of contact from sample to delivery.

Shipping & Import to the UK

OptionTransitBest for
DHL/FedEx express (DDP)3–5 business daysDrops and restocks
Air freight (DDP)6–9 daysMid-size orders
Sea freight28–35 daysContainer-scale inventory

Post-Brexit imports are simpler than most founders fear when the supplier ships DDP: we handle the ~12% apparel duty and 20% import VAT paperwork, so your quote equals your landed cost. Pakistan's working day overlaps the entire UK business day, so sampling conversations happen in real time - a genuine advantage over Far-East time zones. Fits are cut to UK/EU size standards on request.

Who This Is For

UK streetwear and gymwear labels (see our gym wear guide), Sunday-league and university team kit orders, Depop/TikTok Shop sellers moving to their own product, and boutiques adding private label lines.

What We Manufacture for British Brands

Team uniforms & sportswear (16 categories), streetwear (heavyweight tees, oversized hoodies, cargo), women's fashion, blazers & suits, medical scrubs, kidswear, plus size, menswear, intimate apparel and sustainable/eco garments — all fully private-labeled under your brand. See everything we make.

How It Works

  1. Send your design — tech pack, sketch or reference image. Free mockup within 24–48 hours.
  2. Approve your sample — produced in 5–7 days, shipped to your door in United Kingdom.
  3. Bulk production — 2–4 weeks with 4-stage QC (fabric inspection, in-line checks, AQL 2.5 sampling, photo documentation).
  4. DDP delivery — we handle export, freight and UK duty & VAT; you receive sealed cartons ready to sell.

FAQ: Manufacturing for British Brands

Do you handle UK import duty and VAT?

Yes - DDP shipping includes the ~12% apparel duty and 20% import VAT with all paperwork done by us. The quote you approve is your final landed cost in GBP terms.

How long is delivery to the UK?

Express courier takes 3-5 business days after production; total from approved sample to UK doorstep is typically 3-5 weeks.

Can you match UK sizing?

Yes - we grade to UK/EU size charts and can replicate the fit of any UK reference garment. Publish our garment measurements on your product pages to cut returns.

What is the minimum order?

50 pieces per style. UK startups typically launch with 2-3 styles at 50 pieces each - about the cost of a single style at a conventional 300-piece factory.

Are you certified for UK retail requirements?

We hold ISO 9001, BSCI, OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and WRAP certifications - the compliance set UK retailers and marketplaces ask suppliers for.

Get Your United Kingdom Landed-Cost Quote

Send your design and quantities - we reply within 24 hours with unit price, shipping and UK duty & VAT included, so you know your exact landed cost.
